title: Design Group Sticker Book - 3D Gem Stickers, 1000+ Stickers for Kids & Scrapbooking (GESA/1)
features: 3d Gem Stickers - Over 1000 fun stickers included - perfect for kids crafts
Assorted designs for scrapbooking, notebooks, and gifts
Easy peel-and-stick format for little hands to use
Great for decorating, learning, and creative play
Safe, non-toxic, and durable for long-lasting fun
description: Product Description About Anker / Design Group UK Anker / Design Group UK is a leading innovator in creative play, stationery, and gifting products, providing high-quality, affordable, and engaging solutions for all ages. With a strong presence in the global market, the company specializes in designing and manufacturing a diverse range of arts and crafts kits, educational products, and family-friendly activities. Committed to creativity, sustainability, and innovation, Anker / Design Group UK ensures that every product meets rigorous quality standards while reflecting the latest trends in design and functionality. Many of its products are made using FSC® certified materials, promoting responsible sourcing and environmental sustainability. From colouring sets and craft kits to seasonal gifts and classic games, Anker / Design Group UK continues to inspire creativity and bring joy to families worldwide. Whether at home, school, or on the go, their products are designed to spark imagination, learning, and fun for children and adults alike. Safety Warning For external use only
